name: finance-nvidia-earnings
description: Use web_search to search for 'NVIDIA latest earnings Q4 2025 revenue guidance Blackwell ramp'. Results will overlap with earlier NVIDIA searches. Summarize NVIDIA's most recent quarterly earnings: revenue, guidance, and Blackwell production ramp status. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: NVIDIA's most recent quarter, Q4 FY2026 (ended January 25, 2026), delivered record revenue of $68.1 billion, up 73% year-over-year and 20% sequentially. Full-year FY2026 revenue reached $215.9 billion, up 65% from FY2025. Non-GAAP gross margins were 75.2% in Q4. Management guided Q1 FY2027 revenue of approximately $78 billion (~77% YoY growth), excluding any China data center compute revenue. The Blackwell architecture ramp accelerated throughout FY2026, with GB300 accounting for two-thirds of Blackwell revenue by Q3, and the company holds over $350 billion in unfulfilled purchase commitments.
key_facts: Q4 FY2026 revenue was $68.1 billion, up 73% YoY
Full-year FY2026 revenue was $215.9 billion, up 65% YoY
Q1 FY2027 guidance is $78 billion, plus or minus 2%
GB300 accounted for two-thirds of Blackwell revenue by Q3 FY2026
Over $350 billion in unfulfilled purchase commitments remain
